Localization.Description: The removal of a critical resource can indicate an attacker attempting to conceal their actions with the Aria Operations monitoring objects

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} removed a resource from the critical resource list in Aria Operations on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} removed a resource from the critical resource list in Aria Operations on host {event_src.host}
